BOSS Tuner AppChromatic Tuner AppGoogle PlayApp StoreAn authentic BOSS tuner for your smartphone or tabletThe BOSS Tuner app brings BOSS’s leading tuning technology to your favorite iOS and Android mobile devices. Available as a free download, the convenient app

features the familiar look and intuitive display style of the best-selling TU-3 and TU-3W pedal tuner. Using the mic in your device, you can tune a guitar, bass, and other instruments like violin, cello, brass, etc. You can also use it to check pitch accuracy as you practice singing. In addition to chromatic tuning, the app can sound reference pitches for tuning by ear. And with the included newsfeed, you’ll always stay up to date with the latest info on BOSS products.

The BOSS Tuner app is available on the App Store and Google Play.BOSS’s famous chromatic tuning technology in a free mobile appFeatures the look and interface style of the top-selling TU-3 and TU-3W Chromatic TunerProvides hands-free chromatic tuning with a 21-segment meter, note display, and visual tuning indicatorsTune instruments and voices using the built-in mic in your mobile deviceAudible reference pitch function for tuning by earCustomizable skin (TU-3/TU-3W) and background color

Privacy Policy for smart device application BOSS TunerThe software application BOSS tuner ("Application") uses the built-in microphone of the installed device to detect and display pitch.Any information collected through the microphone is used only for the pitch display in the Application, and is never recorded, sent outside the device, or used for collecting personal identifiable information.

You can set the device to deny the access to the built-in microphone from the Application.In that case, the Application cannot detect and display pitch.If you wish to use the Application, allow the access to the microphone.This Privacy Policy is subject to change in accordance with the Application update.By using the Application, you are consenting to the Privacy Policy as set forth now and as amended by us.For the Privacy Policy of Roland Corporation, please seehere.••<><% for (var i=0,len=images.length; i
